metadata.description: The astrojones org plugin index. This repo is only the marketplace; each plugin lives in its own repo.

plugins.name: astrojones-dev
plugins.description: nuklaut deploy knowledge, /new-app scaffolding (born harnessed), and deploy-doctor CI diagnosis.

plugins.name: repo-agent-harness
plugins.description: Coding-workflow skills, subagents, safety hooks, and the /init scaffolder for the repo-agent-harness. The harness MCP server itself is installed per-repo (sha-pinned .mcp.json) by init — the plugin ships no server, so nothing is ever duplicated.
